title: Arnau Garcia-Fernández
text:
About Me
I am a PhD candidate in Biostatistics at Erasmus MC in Rotterdam, the Netherlands. I work on methods and software for survival analysis, longitudinal analysis and joint modeling.

title: Arnau Garcia-Fernández

title: Software
text:
Authors:
Mireia Besalú, Klaus Langohr, Matilde Francisco, Arnau Garcia-Fernández, Guadalupe Gómez Melis
Description:
The GofCens R package offers graphical tools and implements goodness-of-fit tests for right-censored data.
